episodes.title: Clintons condemn Epstein's crimes, deny knowledge or involvement
episodes.description:
In a GOP oversight video released Monday (March 2) former US president Bill Clinton says that he never witnessed wrongdoing during his time around Jeffrey Epstein, while Hillary Clinton said in a separate video that she doesn't recall ever meeting Epstein and has no information about his crimes.

WATCH MORE: https://thestartv.com/c/news
SUBSCRIBE: https://cutt.ly/TheStar
